Add Trade

Single-leg stock/option/future executions plus your sell-side spreads (one summary row each). Spread rows are read-only here — use edit ↗ to manage them on the Sell-Side tab.

Open Positions enter a current price to see unrealized P&L · click a column to sort

Mark prices are saved locally and used for unrealized P&L across the app.

Add Sell-Side Trade

Net credit = collected at open; debit = paid. Closed P&L = (net open − net close) × qty × 100 − fees. Leave close prices & date blank to log an open position.

Prop Firm Fees & Payouts

Negative = cost (subscription, reset, activation fee). Positive = payout. The net flows into your dashboard Realized & Net P&L.

Demo data

Curious what the app looks like full of trades? Flip this on to load a sample portfolio that populates every tab and chart. Your own data is kept safe and returns the moment you switch it off — nothing is saved to this browser or synced to Drive while demo data is showing.

Import CSV

Expected columns (header row, any order, case-insensitive):
date instrument symbol action quantity price fees expiry strike optionType multiplier
• instrument: stock / option / future  •  action: buy / sell (BTO,BTC→buy; STO,STC→sell)
• expiry/strike/optionType only needed for options  •  multiplier auto-fills if blank (option=100, futures by symbol).

Sync across devices Google Drive · your account

Save to a File on Disk Chrome · Edge · Brave · Arc

Backup & Export

Manual snapshot you can keep or move anywhere — works in every browser, separate from the live file above.

Danger Zone

Welcome to Trading LedgerP/L

A fast, private journal for stocks, options, futures and sell-side spreads — with a live P&L dashboard.

  • 📈Log every trade across the Trades, Positions, Sell-Side and Prop Firm tabs, and watch your realized & unrealized P/L update instantly.
  • 📊Dashboard charts — equity curve & drawdown, win rate, P/L by ticker, monthly bars, a daily calendar and more.
  • 🤖AI Trade Coach — chat about your performance using your own free Gemini key (or OpenAI, Claude, OpenRouter).
  • 🎨Themes & sync — pick a look up top, and optionally back up to your own Google Drive.

🔒 Local-first: your data lives in this browser (and only your Drive if you connect it). There's no server — nobody else can see your trades.
